positive_feedback: IN1: check-youtube-backfill-completeness separates content full_backfill_pass from waiver-aware accountability_pass, preserving authoritative inventory denominator and rejecting temporary/unapproved gaps; dedicated tests cover the distinction.

OUT1: run-youtube-sync-oneshot uses video_id idempotency, persisted lease/TTL recovery, already-ingested skip, temporary-failure retry and dry-run zero writes. test_youtube_sync_oneshot covers new→zero second run→retry recovery.

C1-C4: provider adapter, normalized-source schema, untrusted transcript boundary, extractor/relation/graph chain and scheduler-vs-skill ownership agree across SKILL, four prompts and manifest. All referenced assets exist; UBM pytest 199 PASS.
negative_feedback: low: manifest attaches the post-ingest completeness gate to R2 and explains the R4 registry dependency only in a note.
low: R4 dependsOn R3 models the normal skill sequence, while sync ingestion requires an R3-equivalent re-entry; the explicit sync_mode_note prevents false completion but the graph is non-obvious.

notes: The two ordering smells are explicitly documented and do not create contradictions or dependency breaks. Four elegance conditions PASS.
